body.u: One Sunday afternoon whilst lazing around the Garden in my deck chair saw myself. Way back over 50 years I was going to work, my life was exactly the opposite of what I wanted. I had a job that wasn’t worth a spit in eye, and I’ve never had car since I’ve been married. Which is 48 years I have 2 sons 3 daughters and 6 grandchildren, When I was 30 I was made foreman and the hours went down and wages went to £80. My job by the way is at Keresley paper mill shift work, I met my wife whilst sitting in the pub and after a while we got engaged and about three years later we got married. I lost one of my best mates in a car crash when we were drunk, I was 43 we brought our house a bungalow in Leysdown and we’ve lived there ever since that day. But the day came when I started to feel old and. My racing pigeons got more envolvedinvolved, Right until the Mill shut down. I got made redundant and collected £14,000 redundancy money plus my pension, we are ending our lives happily as best we can. But when I look back it wasn’t as bad as I thought after all, I had a wife a house and money in my pocket.
